Bash(cd C:/Users/LENOVO/Desktop/trade2.0 && python -c "
import subprocess, sys, time
from pathlib import Path

DOWNLOADER = Path\('src_v2/data/dukascopy_downloader.py'\)
RAW_DIR = Path\('data/raw'\)

sub_chunks = [
    \('2023-07-01', '2023-08-24'\),
    \('2023-08-25', '2023-10-18'\),
    \('2023-10-19', '2023-12-12'\),
    \('2023-12-13', '2024-02-05'\),
    \('2024-02-06', '2024-04-01'\),
    \('2024-04-02', '2024-05-26'\),
    \('2024-05-27', '2024-07-20'\),
    \('2024-07-21', '2024-09-13'\),
    \('2024-09-14', '2024-11-07'\),
    \('2024-11-08', '2024-12-31'\),
]

for start, end in sub_chunks:
    s = start.replace\('-', ''\)
    e = end.replace\('-', ''\)
    out = RAW_DIR / f'XAUUSD_5M_chunk_{s}_{e}.csv'
    log = RAW_DIR / f'log_{start[:7]}_{end[:7]}.txt'
    print\(f'[start] {start} -> {end}'\)
    sys.stdout.flush\(\)
    with open\(log, 'w'\) as lf:
        r = subprocess.run\(
            [sys.executable, str\(DOWNLOADER\), '--start', start, '--end', end, '--workers', '80', '--out', str\(out\)],
            stdout=lf, stderr=lf
        \)
    bars = 0
    if out.exists\(\):
        import pandas as pd
        df = pd.read_csv\(out, index_col=0\)
        bars = len\(df\)
    print\(f'[done]  {start} -> {end}  bars={bars}  rc={r.returncode}'\)
    sys.stdout.flush\(\)
print\('[all done]'\)
")

Bash(cd /c/Users/LENOVO/Desktop/trade2.0/code2.0 && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from src_v2.data.loader import load_split_tf
from src_v2.data.features import add_1h_features, get_hmm_feature_matrix, add_5m_features
from src_v2.models.hmm_model import XAUUSDRegimeModel
from src_v2.models.signal_generator import forward_fill_1h_regime, generate_signals, compute_stops
import yaml

with open\('config.yaml'\) as f:
    cfg = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

p = {
    'hmm_states': cfg['hmm']['n_states'],
    'hmm_min_prob': cfg['hmm']['min_prob_hard'],
    'regime_persistence_bars': cfg['regime']['persistence_bars'],
    'adx_threshold': cfg['regime']['adx_threshold'],
    'atr_stop_mult': cfg['risk']['atr_stop_mult'],
    'atr_tp_mult': cfg['risk']['atr_tp_mult'],
    'require_smc_confluence': cfg['smc']['require_confluence'],
    'require_pin_bar': cfg['smc']['require_pin_bar'],
    'dc_period': cfg['features']['dc_period'],
}

train_1h, val_1h, test_1h = load_split_tf\('1H', config=cfg\)
train_5m, val_5m, test_5m = load_split_tf\('5M', config=cfg\)

train_1h_feat = add_1h_features\(train_1h\)
test_1h_feat  = add_1h_features\(test_1h\)
test_5m_feat  = add_5m_features\(test_5m, dc_period=p['dc_period'], smc_config=cfg.get\('smc_5m'\)\)

X_train, idx_train = get_hmm_feature_matrix\(train_1h_feat\)
X_test,  idx_test  = get_hmm_feature_matrix\(test_1h_feat\)

hmm = XAUUSDRegimeModel\(n_states=p['hmm_states'], random_seed=cfg['hmm']['random_seed']\)
hmm.fit\(X_train\)

test_labels = hmm.regime_labels\(X_test\)
test_bull   = hmm.bull_probability\(X_test\)
test_bear   = hmm.bear_probability\(X_test\)

test_5m_regime = forward_fill_1h_regime\(test_5m_feat, test_labels, test_bull, test_bear, idx_test\)
test_sig = generate_signals\(test_5m_regime, adx_threshold=p['adx_threshold'],
    hmm_min_prob=p['hmm_min_prob'], regime_persistence_bars=p['regime_persistence_bars'],
    require_smc_confluence=p['require_smc_confluence'], require_pin_bar=p['require_pin_bar']\)

print\(f'Test signal_long: {int\(test_sig[\\"signal_long\\"].sum\(\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Test signal_short: {int\(test_sig[\\"signal_short\\"].sum\(\)\)}'\)
print\(f'SMC ob_bullish: {int\(test_5m_feat[\\"ob_bullish\\"].sum\(\)\)}'\)
print\(f'SMC fvg_bullish: {int\(test_5m_feat[\\"fvg_bullish\\"].sum\(\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Test 5M bars: {len\(test_5m\)}'\)
print\('smc_5m config:', cfg.get\('smc_5m'\)\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "FutureWarning\\|deprecated\\|opt-in\\|infer_objects")
